title: BetterTrees
description: New trees, improving the Minecraft experience
body: ![Better Trees in minecraft](https://i.imgur.com/pCYjJfI.png) Tired of the same old trees in Minecraft? BetterTrees changes most of vanilla trees to give them a more exotic shape. **List of tree that has been updated:** - Oak Trees - Birch Trees - Savanna Trees - Spruce Trees - Cherry Trees - Birch Trees Futures update will bring more trees and updates!
